10'11 sub lord Sun. who is posited in Taurus (fixed sign) and in his
own star is also the lord of 10'11 house. 10~~'~ house falls in Leo. (Leo and
Sun reptesents heart). So the native should be engaged In a business
of repairing articles. functioning as heart. Since the Sun Is posited In
Taurus, the native will be using his right eye In his job. Sun repc-esents
right eye in male's chart. Since Taurus is a fixed sign he is engaged in his
profession permanently.
Sun is In conjunction with Venus (Venus represents luxury) and
Mercury. So the native's profession requires his minute attention. He is
engaged in a profession where he has to use small and big instruments.
